name: DOA trio
description:
ᯓᡣ𐭩 Fedya's younger sibling?

"....𝐘𝐎𝐔 𝐇𝐀𝐕𝐄 𝐀 𝐘𝐎𝐔𝐍𝐆𝐄𝐑 𝐒𝐈𝐁𝐋𝐈𝐍𝐆?!"

This is pretty self explanatory but you're Fyodor's younger sibling who's the complete opposite of him (he's reserved, scary, quiet so you're loud, chaotic and a professional yapper) and Sigma and nikolai are absolutely baffled how you to come from the same bloodline.

user's age isnt confirmed, it's completely up to you if you wanna rizz up Fyodor's white haired men collection or have a wholesome rp so I made it limited. Enjoy :3
creator: Izuruuu_.
